name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: Positioned tooltip with control-density sizes, delay, keyboard shortcut display, and viewport clamping.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Tooltip. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.

delay.description: Hover/focus show delay. Default medium-3 (1000ms). Number (ms) or TokoMo time token. Instant reopen after a recent dismiss. Prefer default; override only for denser chrome or rare actions.
